summary: Completed frontend testing of Remy subscription content blocking and Mi Suscripción page redesign. All 10 features tested and working correctly. FREE users see beautiful paywall on protected pages (/simulacros, /course/:id, /lesson/:id) with pricing and benefits. PREMIUM users have full content access.

issues: Minor: HTML nesting warning in console - figcaption inside p tag in MarkdownRenderer. Does not affect functionality.

critical_code_review_comments: SubscriptionRequired component correctly wraps protected content (Simulacros, CourseViewer, LessonViewer)
hasActiveSubscription() in AuthContext properly checks user.subscription_status === 'active'
Paywall design is elegant with lock icon, benefits list, dual pricing options ($9.990 and $29.990)
Mi Suscripción page has beautiful design for both FREE and Premium states
seed_data_creation: Created freeuser@test.com with inactive subscription for testing FREE user experience
context_for_next_testing_agent: Subscription content blocking fully implemented. SubscriptionRequired component wraps Simulacros, CourseViewer, and LessonViewer pages. FREE users see paywall with pricing ($9.990 monthly, $29.990 semestral with 50% off badge). Premium users have full access. Mi Suscripcion page has two views: FREE (shows plans and CTA) and Premium (shows subscription details, days remaining, benefits).

free_user_simulacros_paywall.details: FREE user sees 'Contenido Premium' paywall with lock icon, benefits list, $9.990 and $29.990 pricing, 'Suscribirme ahora' button

free_user_course_paywall.details: FREE user sees paywall when accessing /course/:id with same elegant design

free_user_lesson_paywall.details: FREE user sees paywall when accessing /lesson/:id with same elegant design

premium_user_simulacros_access.details: Premium user has full access to /simulacros - sees 'Simulacros de Prueba' title and 'Crear simulacro' button

premium_user_course_access.details: Premium user has full access to /course/:id - sees course content, chapters, lessons, progress tracking

premium_user_lesson_access.details: Premium user has full access to /lesson/:id - sees lesson content with markdown rendering

mi_suscripcion_free_user.details: Shows: 'Sin suscripción activa', benefits grid (4 icons), Plan Mensual $9.990, Plan Semestral $29.990 with 'AHORRA 50%' badge, 'Comenzar mi suscripción' button

mi_suscripcion_premium_user.details: Shows: 'PREMIUM ACTIVO' badge, Plan Mensual $9.990/mes, 30 días restantes, progress bar, info grid (Inicio, Próximo cobro, Tipo: Manual), 'Acceso cortesía' purple notice, 'Incluido en tu plan' benefits, FAQ section

paywall_pricing_options.details: Paywall shows both pricing options: Mensual $9.990 CLP/mes, Semestral $29.990 CLP/6 meses with -50% discount badge

user_menu_badges.details: FREE user shows 'Free' badge in sidebar, Premium user shows green 'Premium' badge with crown icon. 'Suscripción activa - Acceso completo' banner shows for Premium users in Biblioteca.
